signals.reasoning: Cover the live SOL short. Even after the chart softened a bit, the position still retained none of peak P&L, remains flagged urgent, has no stop, and liquidation distance is still only about 0.99%. That keeps this in risk-cleanup territory rather than a healthy hold.
BTC is stalling a bit, but it is still holding near the upper end of the recovery range and has not delivered the breakdown that would make the SOL short safe. No fresh action.
ETH remains stable enough that it is not confirming a clean market-wide dump. Position management still means flattening the weak SOL short first.
FARTCOIN is still strongly trend-supported and crowded on the long side. Chasing is late and fading it is still risky from here.
TST is pulling back from the squeeze highs, but it remains too unstable and too crowded to trust as a fresh short or long. Watch-only.
SUPER has very strong negative funding squeeze characteristics, but it is also too distorted and too event-sensitive to trust as a clean fresh trade during live position management.
RESOLV is one of the few names with a somewhat heavier structure, but the edge is still not cleaner than simply fixing the open SOL risk. Keep it on watch.
CHILLGUY still has squeeze support under the hood and the chart remains too mixed to short confidently. No action.
PNUT is fading from the rebound highs, but the structure is still too messy and the liquidity too thin for a reliable management upgrade.
KNEIRO remains too thin and underdefined in the live snapshot to support a confident action call.
BOME is still a noisy rebound name and does not offer cleaner execution than simply covering the failed SOL short.
